title: The Quantum Physicist Responsible For The Marginalization of UFOs
summary: This video discusses Edward Condon, a quantum physicist whose 1966 Condon Committee investigation into UFOs led to the marginalization of UFO research in the latter half of the 20th century. It reveals his connections to the Air Force and his deep involvement in atomic secrets, including his relationship with Robert Oppenheimer.

events.description: The Condon Committee investigation into UFOs was initiated, paid for by the Air Force

key_claims.claim: Edward Condon is the single person most responsible for the marginalization of UFOs
The Condon Committee was supposed to be uninfluenced by the Air Force but Condon was actually coordinating closely with Air Force officials
Colonel Robert Hippler expressed clear written desire that all previous UFO research be shown as a waste of money
Condon studied with Robert Oppenheimer under Max Born in Germany in the 1920s
Condon helped Oppenheimer pick Los Alamos as the site for the Manhattan Project
Condon grew up in Alamogordo, near Los Alamos
